---
name: Feature request
about: Got an idea? Describe it clearly and we'll consider it.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the problem or gap this feature would address. Be specific — "I want X" is less useful than "I can't currently do X, which means I have to Y every time."

## What you're proposing

A clear description of what you want. What would it look like to use this feature day-to-day?

## Why it fits Serenity

How does this align with Serenity's design — local-first, memory-driven, cross-domain? If it doesn't obviously fit, explain why it should be included anyway.

## Alternatives you've considered

Have you tried working around the problem? What didn't work about the alternatives?

## Is this on the roadmap?

Check [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) first — if it's already planned, comment on this issue with your use case rather than opening a new one. More use cases = higher priority.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, links to relevant discussions, or anything else that helps.
